data.description:
Multiple updates to the Campus page.

COPY CHANGES:
1. Hero/section heading: change display text to "Be Ambitious at Fractal Campus"
2. Replace "Want a reduced rate?" with: "First time here? Drop by for free! Contact Crystal (crystal@fractalnyc.com) for a guided tour."
3. Apply text-body-lead style to: "The Fractal Campus is a meeting place in the heart of Williamsburg to do your most ambitious work. We offer 4000+ square feet of both shared office space and private offices, two kitchens, a communal lounge, and a 5000+ square foot private roof deck"
4. Above the bullet points add the lead-in: "All members have access to:"

MEMBERSHIP BUTTONS:
- Remove the Day Pass option entirely
- Move the membership label/text INSIDE each button (not above it), stacked/wrapped within the button
- Button 1 contents (stacked):
    - Full time membership
    - 24/7 access $300/mo
- Button 2 contents (stacked):
    - Part time membership
    - 50 hr/wk $150/mo

BULLET LIST:
- Remove the "hot desk" bullet
- Remove the "private startup office" bullet
- Keep remaining bullets unchanged

PHOTOS SECTION (PREP ALREADY COMPLETE — see comment):
- Replace placeholder images with actual photos already staged at public/images/campus/
- Remove the "Felix loves it here" photo
- Wire up the new photos in the campus page component
- Animate each photo in with the FadeIn pattern from StoryPage.tsx:236 (staggered delay={i * 0.05})

Files: src/components/sections/Campus.tsx (the page lives in this section component).

Acceptance: all copy reads as specified including the literal dollar amounts; membership section shows only 2 buttons with stacked labels inside; bullet list has lead-in "All members have access to:" and excludes hot desk + private startup office; placeholder + Felix photos are replaced with real Williamsburg campus photos that live in the repo (public/images/campus/); photos fade in with stagger.

NOTE: this task supersedes a colliding short-ID FRAC-61 that was re-created with a fresh short ID to avoid clashing with an old done task ("Global search across people..."). Original ULID of the superseded sibling: task_01KTPZZWADKD2SHMWY8W6YY151.
data.title: Campus page: copy edits, membership button restructure, bullet list cleanup, photo replacements

data.body: PREP COMPLETE — photos staged at public/images/campus/ 9 photos copied from ~/Desktop/fractal nyc photos/ with clean lowercase-hyphenated filenames: - coworking-space.webp (was "4200 sq foot coworking space.webp") — NEW, no caption yet - kitchen.webp (was "a full kitchen.webp") - large-call-booths.webp — NEW, no caption yet - bathroom.webp (was "nice and clean bathroom.webp") - parth-and-norman-cozy.webp (was "parth and norman cozy.webp") - rooftop.webp - private-office.avif (was "roomy private office.avif") - seating.webp (was "seating seating seating.webp") - small-call-booths.webp — NEW, no caption yet Source files left in place on Desktop — not deleted. Existing photoCaptions array in src/components/sections/Campus.tsx:92 has 7 entries — one is the Felix caption to remove. After removal: 6 existing captions remain, 9 photos staged = 3 new caption slots needed (coworking-space, large-call-booths, small-call-booths). Photos currently render via PhotoPlaceholder component at Campus.tsx:587 (text-only placeholders — implementing agent will need to swap to real / elements pointing at /images/campus/*). ANIMATION: use the existing FadeIn component (src/components/ui/FadeIn) with staggered delays — see StoryPage.tsx:236: . Wrap each photo so they cascade in. PREVIOUS CONCERN RESOLVED: an earlier comment flagged unresolved merge conflicts in Campus.tsx. Those have since been resolved (autostash dropped, master fast-forwarded to origin/master to bring in PR #205 / FRAC-52 button frost). Campus.tsx is now at the merged-PR state and clean — ready for FRAC-173 work to start from.

data.note: FRAC-173 supersedes the colliding-short-ID FRAC-61 — re-created with a fresh short ID after lattice rebuild revealed an old done task already held FRAC-61.

data.body:
Review pass. Verified diff at b6523a8 against plan task_01KTQ1VVJCVT06HCSQC44FGVRA.md. COPY ✓: hero reads 'Be Ambitious at Fractal Campus'; 'Want a reduced rate?' two-paragraph block replaced with single 'First time here? Drop by for free! Contact Crystal (crystal@fractalnyc.com) for a guided tour.' with inline mailto via InlineLink+CRYSTAL_MAILTO; campus description div now uses 'space-y-6 text-body-lead text-background/90' (no leading-relaxed); 'All members have access to:' inserted as new

above

    , mt-8 moved to

    ,

      now mt-3. MEMBERSHIP ✓: MembershipTiers renders two PrimaryButtons side-by-side, each with stacked inner spans matching plan exactly ('Full time membership' / '24/7 access $300/mo' and 'Part time membership' / '50 hr/wk $150/mo'). All four FLOWGLAD_DAYPASS_URL button instances removed (hero, 'More than a WeWork', 'What's it like', 'Build with us'). FLOWGLAD_DAYPASS_URL constant deleted. BULLETS ✓: amenities array trimmed from 8 to 6 entries — '24/7 hot desk access' and 'Private startup offices' removed; other 6 verbatim. PHOTOS ✓: 9 photos committed at public/images/campus/ (bathroom, coworking-space, kitchen, large-call-booths, parth-and-norman-cozy, private-office.avif, rooftop, seating, small-call-booths). photoCaptions replaced with campusPhotos array of 9 {src,alt,caption} entries; Felix removed. CampusPhoto uses . Outer FadeIn closes before grid; each card wrapped in per StoryPage:230-235 pattern. NO COLLATERAL ✓: only Campus.tsx + 9 photos under public/images/campus/. TYPECHECK ✓: pnpm typecheck clean (tsc --noEmit, no output). Pre-existing duplicate 'First time here?' block at line 369 is unrelated to this task (existed on master). Visual validation deferred per task scope. Pass.

Cycle 2: user QA on deploy preview. (1) Delete Merlin's Place section entirely + MERLINS_URL constant. (2) Remove all emojis from Campus section (line 567 :tada:, line 569 :free:, line 575 :moneybag:, AI Accelerator h2 :zap:). (3) Promote 4 paragraphs to text-body-lead: hero 'First time here?' (currently text-aside text-xs md:text-sm), overview 'First time here?' (currently text-body), AI program first paragraph (currently inheriting text-body from div), 'Meet the Space' 4200 sq ft description (currently text-body). (4) Make 'Be Ambitious at Fractal Campus' fit one line at desktop: drop text-display, use raw utilities text-3xl md:text-4xl (same FRAC-176 pattern bypassing @apply specificity) — mobile may still wrap which is fine.

data.reason: Cycle 2: content polish per user QA

provenance.reason: Cycle 2: content polish per user QA

data.body: Cycle 2 self-review: all 4 buckets (A/B/C/D) applied per spec. Merlin's Place dedicated section + constant removed. Zero emojis remain (grep clean). 4 paragraphs at text-body-lead. Hero heading uses raw utilities. Note: one residual inline href='https://merlins.place/' link survives in an unrelated closing section — flagging in case user wants that also removed.
Cycle 3: revert hero heading to text-display per user. text-3xl md:text-4xl was too small. Restore the original .text-display className; accept that the heading will wrap to 2 lines at desktop.

data.reason: Cycle 3: revert heading size to text-display

provenance.reason: Cycle 3: revert heading size to text-display

data.body: Cycle 5 self-review: hero heading text change only. PR #215 ready for human visual QA. May still wrap 2 lines at desktop/mobile — that's expected at .text-display size with 20-char copy.
